items.title: Record Club is trying to be Letterboxd for music nerds
items.summary: There isn't really a solid equivalent to Goodreads or Letterboxd for music lovers, but Record Club is aiming to change that. Yes, we have Rate Your Music, but its interface is c...

items.title: Ansel Adams' trust says AI-colorized version of his work was exhibited without permission
